{{Quote|The new tour joins the Professional Greenputt Tour (PGT), the Female Professional Greenputt Tour (FPGT), the Asexual Professional Greenputt Tour (APGT), the Not-Dead-Yet Professional Greenputt Tour (NDYPGT) and the Non-Limbed Professional Greenputt Tour (NLPGT).|"Yet Another Greenputt League" reports on the new Non-Sentient Professional Greenputt Tour joining the other established tours|<ref name="HNN" />}}
The '''Not-Dead-Yet Professional Greenputt Tour''', abbreviated '''NDYPGT''', was one of the major professional leagues for [[greenputt]]<ref name="HNN" />—a ball sport played on a field<ref name="Balls">{{SW|url=news/take-me-out-to-the-ballgame-sports-in-the-star-wars-galaxy-part-2|series=Sports in the Star Wars Galaxy|text=Part 2: Take Me Out to the Ball Game|nolive=1}}</ref>—overseen by the [[Greenputt Governing Council]]. The formation of the [[Non-Sentient Professional Greenputt Tour]], which joined the existing professional greenputt leagues, was reported in the news story "Yet Another Greenputt League" in the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3:14]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Not-Dead-Yet Professional Greenputt Tour was first mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #47'']], an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet news published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]]<ref name="HNN" /> on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archivedate=20200305125429}}</ref> The site's content was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
